name: Easy Sweet and Sour Pork
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 lb Lean pork butt or fresh ham
recipeInstructions:
PART 1:
1. Cut pork into 1/2x1/2 inch rectangles. Marinate in mixture of salt, soya sauce and sherry for at least half an hour. While meat is marinating, prepare Part 2.
2. Add 2 tablespoons oil to a wok and heat up to smoking point. Take a slotted spoon and use it to lift pork pieces from the marinade, placing them in the wok. Brown the meat on all sides. Lower the heat slightly to medium high and continue to cook the meat for a full 15 minutes, using a turner to stir the pieces occasionally.
3. At the end of cooking time, place the meat in a serving dish. Pour the sauce from Part 2 over it.
PART 2:
1. Place white sugar and vinegar in a small 1-quart pot. Boil together until the sugar is dissolved. Stir up corn starch in 1/4 cup water. Add to vinegar-sugar boil. Stir the solution, lower the heat to medium low, add pineapple juice and tomato soup. Boil the solution for 15-20 minutes, until it turns from milky red to a clear reddish yellow.
2. Add suggested embellishments. You can use all of them or some of them. Cook for 2 minutes. Serve over Part 1.
